styling_advice: This casual pairing gives your straight, balanced silhouette more structure. The khaki jacket adds definition through the upper body and can be worn closed to visually shape the waist, helping avoid a loose lower-half effect. Light blue denim pants keep the look relaxed while creating a clean vertical line that lengthens the frame. The soft khaki and pale denim also suit your neutral-to-warm coloring and harmonize nicely with your burgundy-brown hair.
